programme.title: Thenali
programme.desc: Thenali suffers from panophobia and seeks doctor Kailash's help but the latter denies his request. Later, when Kailash goes on a vacation with his family, Thenali joins them and charms his sister.

programme.title: Drishyam

programme.title: Dhongee
programme.desc: Chandran lies to his boss that his mother is unwell to get a leave but gets caught. In order to save his job, he is forced to pretend to his boss that he has a good-for-nothing twin brother.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Love Mocktail
programme.desc: After rescuing a woman, Adi reminisces about his love life and tells her about all the heartbreaks he endured in his quest to find his true love.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Love Mocktail 2
programme.desc: With the semblance of leading a normal life, Adi struggles with the loss of his wife, Nidhi. However, Sihi, a charming young woman, enters as a glimmer of hope when she commits to helping Adi.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Meri Haan Teri Naa
programme.desc: Venky and Nandini's relationship changes from mere friendship to something that is more romantic. However, love only blossoms between the two after Nandini's marriage is fixed elsewhere.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Ho Gaya Total Siyapaa
programme.desc: Siddhu abstains from women but works for a female boss whom he detests. When he swears against her, an ascetic curses him such that his soul gets interchanged with that of his boss.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Sun Mere Bhai
programme.desc: When Sulochana rejects Ramana's proposal, he decides to end his life. However, things take a turn when a spirit starts communicating with him.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Pyar Ka Singham
programme.desc: When Prem's new bike gets punctured, he parks it in a nearby locality and decides to come and take it back the next day. However, when he returns, he finds his beloved bike missing from the place.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Anokha Pyaar
programme.desc: Majeed, who is from a rich family, loves his neighbour Suhara, and decides to help her financially. However, when his father turns down his request to sponsor her studies, he leaves his home.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Vaalee
programme.desc: Deva, a man with a hearing and speech impairment, secretly loves his twin brother's wife, Priya. He tries his best to separate the two, to the extent of following them on their honeymoon.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Pyari Padmini
programme.desc: Pannaiyar, a landlord, agrees to take care of his friend's car while the latter is away. However, he and his family soon become emotionally attached to it and cannot bear the idea of returning it.

programme.title: Pyari Padmini

programme.title: Adithya Varma
programme.desc: Adithya Varma, the wayward son of a businessman, tries to turn over a new leaf after he falls for Meera Shetty. However, caste issues derail their love life and appear to darken Adithya's future.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Raanjhanaa Tera

programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Malamaal Company
programme.desc: Saleem, a courier boy, and Pardhu, a cab driver, are working in their current positions after getting defrauded. However, things change after Saleem takes a parcel that contains the country's secrets.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: Goli Soda
programme.desc: Four friends cause trouble for a powerful man who is not a very forgiving man. Thereafter, the friends try to protect themselves and their loved ones from him while trying to fulfil their dreams.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.title: 7Th Day
programme.desc: When two friends run into David, an IPS official, they reveal an unfortunate event that changed their lives. David helps them get out of the mess but he is not what he claims to be.

programme.title: South Masala Promo
programme.desc: An entertainment based program.

programme.desc: A reporter accepts a challenge from the CM to be in power for a day. He rapidly goes about punishing and arresting corrupt officials and politicians, including the CM. Then, he faces the consequences.

programme.title: Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a guy with a cynical attitude towards the concept of love, is challenged by his friends to make three women fall in love with him. Jerry takes up the challenge and begins flirting with them.

programme.title: Ettu Thikkum Madha Yana
programme.desc: When his father is found dead, Natesan decides to find the culprits. While investigating, he learns that his father's death is connected to the murder of his childhood friend.

programme.title: 5 Star
programme.desc: Five college friends promise to stay together even after completing their education. However, one of them hides from the others that he has been forced to marry a village girl.

programme.title: Vasantha Vaasal
programme.desc: Vijay, Divya's tenant, aspires to become an actor and constantly disturbs her by reciting movie dialogues loudly. Divya, who wants to excel in studies, despises the film industry.

programme.title: Thalakonam
programme.desc: Thalakonam is ithesh in the lead role an action-drama in romatical love story movie

programme.title: Puthumai Pithan
programme.desc: Jeeva is framed and sent to a mental asylum and his family murdered when he earns the enmity of a corrupt politician. He escapes the asylum and exacts revenge on the politician who destroyed his life.

programme.title: Gummalam
programme.desc: Four friends fall in love with Rathi when she moves in into their neighbour's house. Later, the police arrest her and they all get shocked to learn about her true identity.

programme.title: Magane En Marumagan
programme.desc: Singaram, a loafer, tricks a rich man in a village and gets married to his daughter. When Singaram is accused of killing his enemy, he is forced to flee to Chennai.

programme.title: Kalai Jan
programme.desc: Pop singer Inderjeet is the main suspect after his female fans are killed by a serial killer. Divya, whose sister was a dancer in his troupe and the first target, comes to the city to find the killer.

programme.title: Kalai Jan
programme.desc: Pop singer Inderjeet is the main suspect after his female fans are killed by a serial killer. Divya, whose sister was a dancer in his troupe and the first target, comes to the city to find the killer.

programme.title: Dharmathin Thalaivan
programme.desc: When Raju loses his soft-spoken, loving elder brother Balu in a fight, he gives up his violent ways. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his brother's lookalike, who is a criminal.

programme.title: Chennai Ungalai Anbudan Varaverikirath
programme.desc: Three bachelors face several difficult hurdles when they move to Chennai in a bid to make something of their lives and try to overcome the internal and external troubles that they face.

programme.title: Aaranyam
programme.desc: Aravind, a young robber, falls in love with Divya who is one of his victims. But her father, a police officer, is against their relationship, so they both elope into a dense forest and live together.

programme.title: Acharam
programme.desc: Suriya, a sub-inspector, hates modern women and kills them secretly at night. When he meets Ramya, the wife of an architect, he becomes obsessed with her.

programme.title: Mugamariyaan
programme.desc: A serial killer commits a series of murders and then steals the hearts of the victims. However, when five college girls get trapped in his hands, it is up to them to decide how to escape alive.

programme.title: AGP
programme.desc: When a person loses her entire family to an accident, it leads her to a disorder along with hallucination and depression.

programme.title: Vaanatha Pola
programme.desc: Vellaichaamy sacrifices love for his three brothers, resisting marriage when he discovers his beloved intends to separate them.

programme.title: Savarikkadu
programme.desc: A group of friends decide to travel to Savarikkadu despite learning about the mysteries surrounding the place. Later, they get lost in the forest and try to find each other.
